name: ROUTE64.ORG
notes:
We have a lot small networks behind our network.

Our goal is to bring connectivity to all as specially the IPv6 connectivity to the ones without. Thus, we running a free, based on sponsoring, free IPv6 tunnelbroker and transit service for all of you.

Do you want to support our mindset of bringing IPv6 to a high adoption rate and higher level? We are happy of any support you can provide or sponsor (transit, dedicated server, ix access,..).
